hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c); process.stdin.on('end',()=>{ const j=JSON.parse(d); process.stdout.write(j.tool_input&&j.tool_input.file_path||j.tool_response&&j.tool_response.filePath||''); });" <<< "$INPUT"); FNAME=$(basename "$FILE"); cd "C:/Users/Hansei/Desktop/claude" && git add "$FILE" 2>/dev/null && git diff --cached --quiet || (git commit -m "auto: update $FNAME" && git push origin main) 2>/dev/null || true
